[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 11111111 a
1 11111111 a
2 11111111 a
3 11111111 a
4 11111111 a
5 01101010 4
6 01111011 6
7 10010111 5
